title: Lost in the Mall 走失找妈妈
scene: Amy在超市里和妈妈走散了，向店员求助。

lines.en: Excuse me. I cannot find my mom.
lines.zh: 打扰了。我找不到我妈妈了。

lines.en: How did you get separated from her?
I was looking at the toys and she was buying fruit.
lines.zh: 我在看玩具，她在买水果。

lines.en: It is OK. Do you know her name or phone number?
lines.zh: 没关系。你知道她的名字或电话号码吗？

lines.en: I know her phone number. It is one-three-six...
lines.zh: 我知道她的电话号码。是一三六……

lines.en: Good. I will make an announcement over the speaker.
lines.zh: 很好。我用广播通知一下。

lines.en: Yes. I will say your name and where you are.
lines.zh: 能。我会说你的名字和你在哪里。

lines.en: OK. I will wait here. I promise not to wander.
lines.zh: 好的。我在这里等。我保证不乱走。

lines.en: Stay right here. Your mom will come soon.
lines.zh: 就在这里等着。你妈妈很快就来。
